Package ru.nsu.krasnyanskii.model

Class OopCheckerConfig

java.lang.Object
ru.nsu.krasnyanskii.model.OopCheckerConfig
public class OopCheckerConfig extends Object
Root configuration object populated from DSL files. Uses explicit getters/setters instead of @Data because business-logic methods (find*, getBonusFor) would clash with generated equals/hashCode.

      Returns:
      Optional containing the group, or empty

    • getBonusFor

      public double getBonusFor(String github, String taskId)
      Returns the total bonus points for a student on a specific task.
      Parameters:
      github - GitHub username
      taskId - task identifier
      Returns:
      sum of all matching bonus entries, or 0.0
